leads: A solo founder was entering a $73.7B market with conviction but no strategic infrastructure. Every decision was load-bearing and none of them were documented. We built an 8-document system where every artifact reinforces every other.
highlights: Strategic blueprint with 5 core design principles and a 3-tier pricing architecture
Comprehensive competitor and market landscape across 4 competitor categories
18-month tactical playbook with week-by-week execution specificity
3-year financial projection modeling conservative, base and aggressive scenarios ($228K to $1.18M revenue trajectory)
Metrics dashboard with 3-tier measurement system and pre-built scenario response protocols
Risk management framework covering 11 identified threats across 3 priority tiers
Every document cross-references every other document in a self-navigating strategic system.
